direct_competitors.name: 7BR Luxury Villa, Koggala Lake
direct_competitors.positioning: Newly renovated, gated oasis, saltwater pool
direct_competitors.weakness: No dedicated website, OTA-dependent, no direct booking incentive

direct_competitors.name: Villa Ahangama
direct_competitors.positioning: 5-bed family & group villa, paddy field views
direct_competitors.weakness: Smaller capacity (12 vs 24), premium platform = price premium

direct_competitors.name: Lakeview Villa, Ahangama
direct_competitors.weakness: Only 8 guests max, much smaller than Ko Lake

direct_competitors.name: Casa Soulei / Kuki Beach
direct_competitors.weakness: Beach only — no lake access, no dual-access USP

competitive_advantages_ko_lake: LARGEST capacity in area: 7 rooms, 24 guests (competitors max 12)
DUAL access: 60ft infinity pool + lake jetty + 350m beach
FULL staff including dedicated chef (not just 'cook')
300 Mbps fiber wifi (unmatched in area for digital nomads)
FREE airport pickup incentive (no competitor offers this)

meta_trends_2026.format: Advantage+ campaigns with broad targeting + strong creative
meta_trends_2026.creative_style: Lo-fi / authentic content outperforms polished studio shots
meta_trends_2026.targeting: Broad targeting with AI optimization, NOT hyper-specific interests
meta_trends_2026.campaign_structure: Fewer campaigns, more creative variations within each

google_trends_2026.format: Performance Max with maximum asset diversity
google_trends_2026.best_practice: Upload maximum assets, let Google AI combine them
google_trends_2026.landing_page_congruence: Critical — ad promise MUST match landing page

competitor_ad_patterns: Heavy OTA presence (Booking.com, Airbnb) dominates paid search
Very few private villas running direct Meta campaigns in Sri Lanka
Most competitor ads are generic 'beautiful villa' without specific proof
Gap: NO competitor is running urgency-based seasonal campaigns (Easter/Avurudu)
Gap: NO competitor is using WhatsApp-first CTA in paid ads
winning_hooks_in_market: Experience, don't just visit — [X] days at [property]

Why 24 guests chose this villa over a 5-star hotel
